item_1.imageAlt: women working in lab contact center
item_1.name: Hero Container Item
Text Container Text
item_1.text: We’re here to support you—whether you’d like information about our medicines and devices or have questions about access and affordability.

item_1.name: Text Container Text
item_1.text: Need help with a medicine or product?

item_0.name: Accordion Item
item_0.text:
For Customer Service support across products, therapies, and account-related needs:

  • Allergan Aesthetics: 1-800-377-7790
  • Alle: 1-888-912-1572
  • New Aesthetic Accounts: 1-844-NEW-2AGN (1-844-639-2246); aestheticsonboarding@abbvie.com
  • Anti-Infectives: 855-387-2821
  • Botox Therapeutic: 1-800-44-BOTOX (1-800-442-6869)
  • HCP support for Direct or Advantage: 1-844-246-2461
  • Durysta: 1-833-DURYSTA (1-833-387-9782)
  • Liletta: 1-855-LILETTA (1-855-545-3882)
  • Lupron: 1-800-621-1020
  • Ozurdex and Xen: 1-866-698-7339
  • Refresh Concierge: 1-833-733-7675
  • SkinMedica Consumer Care: 1-888-912-1596
  • AbbVie Pharmaceuticals (General): 1-800-255-5162
  • Accounts Receivable: 1-800-811-4148

item_1.name: Accordion Item
item_1.text:
For Customer Service support across products, therapies, and account-related needs:

  • Allergan Aesthetics: 1-800-377-7790
  • Alle: 1-888-912-1572
  • New Aesthetic Accounts: 1-844-NEW-2AGN (1-844-639-2246); aestheticsonboarding@abbvie.com
  • Anti-Infectives: 855-387-2821
  • Botox Therapeutic: 1-800-44-BOTOX (1-800-442-6869)
  • HCP support for Direct or Advantage: 1-844-246-2461
  • Durysta: 1-833-DURYSTA (1-833-387-9782)
  • Liletta: 1-855-LILETTA (1-855-545-3882)
  • Lupron: 1-800-621-1020
  • Ozurdex and Xen: 1-866-698-7339
  • Refresh Concierge: 1-833-733-7675
  • SkinMedica Consumer Care: 1-888-912-1596
  • AbbVie Pharmaceuticals (General): 1-800-255-5162
  • Accounts Receivable: 1-800-811-4148

item_2.name: Accordion Item
item_2.summary: Adverse Events and Product Quality Concerns
item_2.text: To report a side effect or a product quality concern, please contact AbbVie Medical Services at 1-800-633-9110. Specialists are available Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:30 PM CT.

item_3.name: Accordion Item
item_3.text:
Patient Support, Resources & Assistance:
Patient Support: Click Here
Savings Card Information: Click Here
myAbbVie Assist Patient Assistance Program: Click Here or call (for myAbbVie assist only):
myAbbVie Assist: 1-800-222-6885
myAbbVie Assist Oncology: 1-844-900-2228

item_4.name: Accordion Item
item_4.text: If you have medical information, product information, storage or ingredient question please contact AbbVie Medical Information at 844-663-3742. Specialists are available Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:30 PM CT. You may also submit your question at AbbVie Medical Information.

item_1.name: Accordion Item
item_1.text:
If you have a partnership or technology opportunity that may be of interest to AbbVie, we want to hear from you. Submit your non-confidential information here for review.

Contact us

item_2.name: Accordion Item
item_2.text:
Visit careers.abbvie.com to search for current opportunities.

For career-related inquiries, email: talentacquisition@abbvie.com.

item_3.name: Accordion Item
item_3.text:
Payment requirements

For questions concerning invoice status or payment, please reach out to the CDO helpdesk at AbbvieCDO@abbvie.com.

US invoices submitted by using the following:

EDI Invoicing, please contact the helpdesk at AbbvieCDO@abbvie.com

Mail, AbbVie Inc, P.O. Box 210075, Dallas, TX 75211

Fax, 214-329-0920

Email: abbvie.us.usap@ironmountain.com

Email: PCYC only abbvie.us.6701@ironmountain.com

For OUS invoices, please work with your site contact for information on where to send your invoices.

item_4.name: Accordion Item
item_4.text:
As an embedded Contract Manufacturing Organization (CMO), we leverage decades of scientific expertise, operational excellence, and best-in-class facilities to provide you with one of the most reliable manufacturing options for high quality supply chain assurance. From development to commercialization, we can efficiently support your vision to market to help improve the lives of patients world-wide.

Email: abbviecontractmfg@abbvie.com
Route to website: https://www.abbviecontractmfg.com

item_1.name: Accordion Item
item_1.text:
Investor Relations:

Liz Shea
847-935-2211

For shareholder contact information, please visit the Investors site.

item_2.name: Accordion Item
item_2.text: For media related inquiries, please visit our Media Contacts page.

item_1.name: Accordion Item
item_1.text:
For technical support, please contact the appropriate support team below:

Phone: 1-800-252-4415 (toll-free within the US) or follow the International toll-free instructions on the SPIRIT Submission Portal.

item_2.name: Accordion Item
item_2.text:
AbbVie’s Ethics Helpline is available 24 hours a day, seven days a week to raise concerns and report suspected or actual violations of our Code of Business Conduct, policies, procedures, or laws and regulations, without fear of retribution or retaliation. Concerns can be raised confidentially, and you can choose to remain anonymous, where permitted by law.

AbbVie offers country-specific telephone numbers below to raise concerns and report suspected or actual violations.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: You can find AbbVie in 5 world regions and more than 70 countries.
